name: driver-log
description: DriverLog — local-first driver log book. site/ is the deployed static app (no build step, no dependencies of its own — deployed separately to Hostinger). api/ holds the Vercel serverless functions that replace PocketBase: email/password + LINE OAuth2 auth, and CRUD sync for sessions/fuel against Neon (lib/db.js). Deliberately left without "type": "module" — Node's native require(esm) interop already loads the ESM `export default` syntax in api/*.js and lib/*.js fine without that flag.
